task_completion.description: Open the tactical_uav.vsp3 model in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenVSP application is open with 'tactical_uav.vsp3' visible in the title bar or the Geometry Browser.
The 'Mass Properties' dialog window is open and shows computed results, or a file explorer/terminal shows the newly created 'tactical_uav_MassProps.txt' file.

task_completion.description: Add a new Pod component named 'LaunchHook'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Geometry Browser lists a Pod component that has been renamed to 'LaunchHook'.

task_completion.description: Set the LaunchHook dimensions to Length: 0.15 m and Max Diameter: 0.05 m
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Pod geometry parameter window for 'LaunchHook' shows Length set to 0.15 and Diameter/Max Diameter set to 0.05.

task_completion.description: Position the LaunchHook at the computed X_cg, Y: 0.0, Z: -0.3
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Xform/Location tab for 'LaunchHook' shows XLocation matching the computed X_cg, YLocation at 0.0, and ZLocation at -0.3.

task_completion.description: Save the updated model to uav_launch_ready.vsp3
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP title bar updates to 'uav_launch_ready.vsp3', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file with this exact name in /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenVSP graphical interface being used to add and modify the Pod component, rather than a text editor modifying the .vsp3 XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely computed the Mass Properties to find X_cg
integrity.visual_evidence: The Mass Properties analysis window is visible in at least one screenshot, showing the agent actually ran the tool to find the CG.

integrity.description: The entered XLocation matches the dynamically computed X_cg
integrity.visual_evidence: The XLocation value entered in the LaunchHook's Xform tab exactly matches the CG X value displayed in the Mass Properties results window or the tactical_uav_MassProps.txt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact longitudinal Center of Gravity (X_cg) is randomized at runtime (between -3.0 and 3.0) and cannot be known in advance. You must verify that the XLocation entered for the LaunchHook exactly matches the X_cg value computed by the Mass Properties analysis visible in the agent's screenshots.
